privileged_info_summary: The task migrates a PostgreSQL 13 database named 'chinook' from container chinook-pg13 (port 5433) to PostgreSQL 15 in container chinook-pg15 (port 5434) with credentials username 'chinook' and password 'chinook_secret_2019'. The database contains 11 tables: Artist, Album, MediaType, Genre, Track, Customer, Employee, Invoice, InvoiceLine, Playlist, and PlaylistTrack. The task uses a subset of the public Chinook sample database (from https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database), containing 70 artists, 10 customers, and 8 employees. The pass threshold is 65 points.
